summary: SAML IdP Simulator Testing Complete - Backend APIs and Frontend UI fully functional. All 4 backend endpoints tested with 25 test cases (18 passed via pytest, rate-limited tests verified via curl). Frontend navigation, tenant selection, validation, test flow, and SAML response generation all working correctly.

tests: Returns 401 for unauthenticated requests
Returns 403 for tenant admin (non-super_admin)
Returns 200 with list of 15 tenants for super admin
Each tenant has code, name, sso_enabled, sso_provider, has_saml_config fields
ORMD0001 shows has_saml_config=true, sso_enabled=false, sso_provider=saml
Returns 401 for unauthenticated requests
Returns 403 for tenant admin
Returns 404 for non-existent tenant
Returns 200 with 10 validation checks for ORMD0001
overall_status=incomplete (SSO disabled but config present)
Returns SP metadata with entity_id, acs_url, slo_url, name_id_format
Returns 401 for unauthenticated requests
Returns 403 for tenant admin
Returns 404 for non-existent tenant
Returns SAML response XML with samlp:Response and saml:Assertion
Returns valid base64 encoding of SAML XML
Response includes response_id, assertion_id, acs_url, issue_instant, not_on_or_after
NameID defaults to user email
Returns 401 for unauthenticated requests
Returns 403 for tenant admin
Returns 404 for non-existent tenant
Returns 6 flow steps with step, name, status, detail
Status values are pass/fail/warning/skip (color-coded)
Returns SAML endpoints (login_url, acs_url, slo_url, metadata_url)
Returns config_valid boolean and config_issues list
Super Admin Dashboard has 'SAML Simulator' button with data-testid
Button click navigates to /admin/saml-simulator
Back button navigates to previous page
Tenant dropdown shows all tenants with SSO status badges
ORMD0001 shows 'SAML' and 'SSO Off' badges in dropdown
Selected tenant shows status badges: SSO: Disabled, Provider: saml, SAML Config: Present
Form appears after tenant selection
Has Email, First Name, Last Name, Student ID, Department fields
Fields have data-testid attributes
Button visible with Shield icon and data-testid
Click fetches validation from API
Shows validation result card with Incomplete/Ready badge
Shows 10 checks with pass/fail icons and severity badges (critical/warning/info)
Shows SP Metadata section with copy buttons
Button visible with Play icon and data-testid
Click fetches test flow from API
Shows toast 'Test flow completed'
Shows 6 flow steps with numbered badges and status colors
Shows SAML Endpoints section with copy buttons
Button visible with FileCode icon and data-testid
Click fetches generated response from API
Shows toast 'SAML Response generated'
Shows metadata cards: Response ID, NameID, Issue Instant, Not On Or After, ACS URL
Shows warning note about unsigned simulated response
Toggle Show/Hide XML button works
Shows SAML XML with syntax highlighting and Copy XML button
Shows Base64-encoded SAMLResponse with Copy button
Route protected in App.js for super_admin only
Tenant admin redirected to /dashboard when accessing /admin/saml-simulator
All 4 endpoints return 401 for unauthenticated requests
All 4 endpoints return 403 for tenant admin (non-super_admin)

critical_code_review_comments: SAML Simulator implementation is well-structured with proper authorization checks using _require_super_admin()
All endpoints properly use Depends(get_current_user) for authentication
Frontend uses data-testid attributes for all interactive elements - good for testing
SAML Response generation properly uses base64 encoding (not deflate) for POST binding
Warning note correctly informs users that simulated responses are unsigned

success_rate.backend: 100% (25 test cases via pytest + curl verification)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing ORMD0001 tenant with SAML config
context_for_next_testing_agent: SAML IdP Simulator feature fully tested. Key routes: /admin/saml-simulator (frontend), /api/saml-simulator/* (4 backend endpoints). Super admin only access. ORMD0001 has SAML config present but SSO disabled. All buttons work: Validate Config, Run Test Flow, Generate SAML Response. Rate limiting may affect pytest runs - use curl with stored token for verification.

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real - no mocking. SAML responses are simulated but unsigned (as designed).
